div1.entryFree: Placket, probably a stomacher (according to some a petticoat, or the opening in it): dread prince of --s, LLL III, 186. will they wear their --s where they should bear their faces? Wint. IV, 4, 245 (the clown's speech; == will they openly show to strangers what they ought to keep for their friends?). you might have pinched a p., it was senseless, Wint. IV, 4, 245 those that war for a p. Troil. II, 3, 22.* keep thy hand out of --s, Lr. III, 4, 100.
